---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## 📝 Proposed Solution
How would this feature work? Describe your ideal implementation.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## 📊 Use Case
Who would use this feature? How would they use it?

**Example:**
```bash
# How you'd use the feature
flash new-command --option value
```

## 🚀 Priority
- [ ] Critical (blocks my work)
- [ ] High (would save significant time)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (minor improvement)

## 🤝 Willing to Contribute?
- [ ] Yes, I can implement this feature
- [ ] Yes, I can help test it
- [ ] No, but I'd love to see it implemented

## 📎 Additional Context
Any other information, mockups, or examples.
